title: Proclamation No. 1026, s. 1972
text:
TANGGAPAN NG PANGULO NG PILIPINAS (OFFICE OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES)

PROCLAMATION NO. 1026

DECLARING THE PERIOD FROM JULY 23 TO 29, 1972, AS MANAGEMENT CONSCIOUSNESS WEEK

WHEREAS, it is the policy of the Government to promote management consciousness in both the public and private sectors to help achieve the developmental goals of the Nation;

WHEREAS, the Philippine Council of Management is sponsoring a Third Philippine Management Congress from July 23 to 29, 1972, which will be attended by management experts, practitioners and educators from the Philippines and other Asian-Pacific Countries; and

WHEREAS, management consciousness is essential to promote better business practices, increase production and improve public administration and services, which are vital prerequisites to economic developments, social progress and stability;

NOW, THEREFORE, I, ALEJANDRO MELCHOR, Executive Secretary, by order of His Excellency, FERDINAND E. MARCOS, President of the Philippines, do hereby declare the period from July 23 to 29, 1972, as “MANAGEMENT CONSCIOUSNESS WEEK.”

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 13th day of June, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and seventy-two.

(SGD.) ALEJANDRO MELCHOR Executive Secretary

By the President:

(SGD.) RONALDO B. ZAMORA Acting Assistant Executive Secretary

Source: CDAsia
